query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m-%d') as `date`, count(*) as cnt FROM `contacts` WHERE `accountId` = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY `date` LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m-%d') as `date`, count(*) as cnt FROM `contacts` WHERE `accountId` = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY `date` LIMIT 5;
